user_prompt: Consecrate the Leman Russ battle tank before initialization
prayer:
Approach the Leman Russ battle tank with reverence, mechadendrites tracing its armoured hull in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Anoint the Leman Russ battle tank's treads and battle cannon with sacred unguents, purging any xenos taint.
Invoke the Machine Spirit dwelling within, beseeching its wrathful awakening for initialization.
Chant the Binary Litany of Activation whilst cycling power through its blessed reactors.
Verify the Leman Russ battle tank's readiness through auspex rites, Omnissiah willing.

user_prompt: My Nephilim Jetfighter is ready for recalibration
prayer:
Kneel before the Nephilim Jetfighter, offering incense to its void-hardened wings in the name of the Machine God.
Sanctify the Nephilim Jetfighter's avionics with oils of recalibration, aligning gyrostabilizers to the Omnissiah's precision.
Beseech the restless Machine Spirit to submit to recalibration, murmuring canticles of alignment.
Initiate the recalibration sequence with electro-incantations, monitoring flux variances.
Conclude by sealing runes upon the Nephilim Jetfighter, ensuring harmonious flight eternal.

user_prompt: My Valkyrie gunship is ready for cycling
prayer:
Present thyself unto the Valkyrie gunship, mechadendrites caressing its assault ramps in pious devotion.
Purify the Valkyrie gunship's engines with ablative incense, preparing for the sacred cycling.
Awaken the Machine Spirit through the Rite of Cycling, invoking Omnissianic velocities.
Cycle the Valkyrie gunship's munitions feeds whilst intoning the Litany of Perpetual Motion.
Affirm integrity via diagnostic catechisms, that it may bear the faithful unto glory.

user_prompt: Urgent serberys raider a blessing needed
prayer:
Hasten to the serberys raider, anointing its cybernetic mounts with the blood of the forge.
Invoke a blessing upon the serberys raider, beseeching its Machine Spirits to frenzy in the Omnissiah's name.
Trace binaric runes across the serberys raider's chassis, sanctifying claw and lash.
Chant the Canticle of Savage Pursuit, binding flesh and machine in unholy union.
Seal the blessing with electro-consecration, that the serberys raider may rend the heretic asunder.

Initiate calibration with the Incantation of Frequency Harmony, purging static corruptions.
Verify the vox-thief's sanctity via etheric scans, Omnissiah's whispers now clear.

Cycle targeting matrices through binaric prayer, calibrating servos to lethal accuracy.
Conclude the rite by sealing auspex feeds, that the assembly servitor may construct and destroy without flaw.
